source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ FDA/기술문서/clinical considerations/Attachment-1_clinical considerations.docx

document.title: Attachment-1 Clinical Considerations
document.documentType: Clinical considerations / plain radiographic image comparison

sourceSummary.oneLine: Clinical comparison of plain radiographic images obtained with ADD by H&abyz and Samsung S4335AW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports clinical image-quality considerations for the ADD device by comparing radiographic views, exposure conditions, DICOM acquisition, image findings, grading, and overall conclusions against a comparative device.
keyPoints: Objective Device is listed as ADD by H&abyz; Comparative Equipment is listed as S4335AW made by Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd.
Output data for communications standard DICOM 3.0 is used for downloading and analysis.
Thirty radiographic views were evaluated with S4335AW and ADD average values, giving a Total Average of 3.46 for S4335AW and 3.61 for ADD.
The conclusion states that images obtained with ADD are comparable or superior to the same view obtained from a similar patient with S4335AW.
The conclusion states that spatial and soft tissue contrast resolution are superior using ADD, especially soft tissues on extremity films.

concepts.name: DICOM 3.0
concepts.evidence: By these presents output data for communications standard DICOM 3.0 is used to format at the data for downloading and analysis

concepts.name: Plain radiographic image comparison
concepts.evidence: After comparing a broad review of plain radiographic images taken with the ADD and the S4335AW, the images obtained with the ADD are comparable or superior to the same view obtained from a similar patient with the S4335AW.

concepts.name: Radiographic image grading
concepts.evidence: ( Grade S : Perfect=4 , A : excellent=3 , B : average=2 C : poor=1 )

evidence.claim: The document identifies ADD by H&abyz as the objective device.
evidence.evidenceText: Objective Device : ADD by H&abyz (On the Right)

evidence.claim: The document identifies S4335AW made by Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd. as the comparative equipment.
evidence.evidenceText: Comparative Equipment : S4335AW made by Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd. (On the Left)

evidence.claim: The document states that DICOM 3.0 output data is used for downloading and analysis.
evidence.evidenceText: By these presents output data for communications standard DICOM 3.0 is used to format at the data for downloading and analysis

evidence.claim: The X-ray condition table includes 30 radiographic examination views with kVp, mAs, and patient body type.
evidence.evidenceText: X-ray Condition NO Large group Middle group Small group kVp mAs P’T body type

evidence.claim: The average value table reports a Total Average of 3.46 for S4335AW and 3.61 for ADD.
The document concludes that ADD images are comparable or superior to S4335AW images.
evidence.evidenceText: After comparing a broad review of plain radiographic images taken with the ADD and the S4335AW, the images obtained with the ADD are comparable or superior to the same view obtained from a similar patient with the S4335AW.

evidence.claim: The document concludes that spatial and soft tissue contrast resolution are superior using ADD.
evidence.evidenceText: In general, both the spatial and soft tissue contrast resolution are superior using the ADD. Specifically, the soft tissues on extremity films were seen with better clarity.

evidence.claim: The document concludes there is no difficulty evaluating a wide range of anatomic structures necessary to provide a correct conclusion.
evidence.evidenceText: There is no difficulty in evaluating a wide range of anatomic structures necessary to provide a correct conclusion.

evidence.claim: The document is signed by Dr. Jung Man - Lee and dated August 28, 2020.
evidence.evidenceText: Sincerely, Dr. Jung Man - Lee August 28, 2020
